case_title: BIANCA VERONIKA WIDMARK VS. RICHARD MACKOTA

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT (CCP 116.850)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY WIDMARK, BIANCA VERONIKA AS TO DEFENDANT MACKOTA, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE -GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WIDMARK, BIANCA VERONIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACKOTA, RICHARD $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $380.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JAN-25-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACKOTA, RICHARD
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE AND DECLARATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIDMARK, BIANCA VERONIKA AS TO DEFENDANT MACKOTA, RICHARD
EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA USPS FROM THE PLAINTIFF BIANCA VERONIKA WIDMARK FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF APPEARED THROUGH COURT CALL. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIDMARK, BIANCA VERONIKA
